mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tiktok_ads WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM tiktok_ads WHERE ad_id = #{adId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM tiktok_ads WHERE adgroup_id = #{adgroupId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM tiktok_ads WHERE advertiser_id = #{advertiserId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM tiktok_ads WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM tiktok_ads ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tiktok_ads SET ad_name = #{adName}, creative_type = #{creativeType}, video_id = #{videoId}, image_ids = #{imageIds}, ad_text = #{adText}, call_to_action = #{callToAction}, landing_page_url = #{landingPageUrl}, display_name = #{displayName}, pixel_id = #{pixelId}, operation_status = #{operationStatus}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tiktok_ads SET operation_status = #{operationStatus}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ad_id = #{adId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tiktok_ads ( advertiser_id, campaign_id, adgroup_id, ad_id, ad_name, creative_type, video_id, image_ids, ad_text, call_to_action, landing_page_url, display_name, pixel_id, operation_status ) VALUES
(#{item.advertiserId}, #{item.campaignId}, #{item.adgroupId}, #{item.adId}, #{item.adName}, #{item.creativeType}, #{item.videoId}, #{item.imageIds}, #{item.adText}, #{item.callToAction}, #{item.landingPageUrl}, #{item.displayName}, #{item.pixelId}, #{item.operationStatus})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ad_name = VALUES(ad_name), creative_type = VALUES(creative_type), video_id = VALUES(video_id), image_ids = VALUES(image_ids), ad_text = VALUES(ad_text), call_to_action = VALUES(call_to_action), landing_page_url = VALUES(landing_page_url), display_name = VALUES(display_name), pixel_id = VALUES(pixel_id), operation_status = VALUES(operation_status), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
